1.name: Burkland Associates
1.verdict: The internet offers no direct customer reviews or testimonials for Burkland Associates based on the provided data. The firm is mentioned in two relevant contexts on Reddit's r/Accounting: one user specifically requested feedback on their services for software companies needing R&D credits, and another user listed them as one of four fractional CFO firms they evaluated before leaning towards competitors. There is not enough public commentary to form a clear picture of their service quality.

recurring_themes.theme: Mentioned as an option in fractional CFO consideration sets
Associated with R&D credits for software companies
